articles.author: Lauren Weber
articles.title: She blamed flu shots for her twins’ deaths. Now she’s charged with murder. - The Washington Post
articles.description: Andrea Shaw, a plaintiff in a lawsuit against the American Academy of Pediatrics for recommending childhood vaccines, is accused of suffocating her daughter and son.
articles.content: A few days after her18-month-old twins died in May of last year, Idaho mom Andrea Shaw appeared on an online show run by the anti-vaccine group founded by Health Secretary Robert F. Kennedy Jr. and b… [+49 chars]
